series_metadata.series_title: Coal Surface Mining Reclamation Fund Records
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents payments received from mine operators for the Coal Surface Mining Reclamation Fund in lieu of a performance bond as specified in Code of Virginia, § 45.1-241. When fund dissolved, remaining monies will be dispersed at the direction of the Fund Advisory Board.

retention_rules.trigger_event: receipt of payment, microfilm or scan records according Library of Virginia's standards/guidelines; records in new format permanently. original camera negative Imaging Services Branch of Library of Virginia. originals quality control inspection verifies information was successfully transferred new format. Document destruction of original records reformatting onCertificate of Records Disposal(RM-3 form)

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents division's receipt and management of federal grants used to administer and enforce federal regulations and statutes. Refer to 30CFR735.1 through 28.

retention_rules.trigger_event: end of fiscal year in which grant closed or submission of final expenditure report or audited, whichever is greater

series_metadata.series_title: Federal Indirect Cost Rates and Manuals
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the standard costs charged the federal government for indirect costs expended in support of federal grants. Refer to 30CFR735.1 through 28.

retention_rules.trigger_event: expiration of grant or audited, whichever is greater

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the divisions's reporting of financial status to the State Comptroller. Statements include financial status, assets, liabilities, expenditures, revenues and net worth. Refer to 30CFR735.1 through 28.

retention_rules.trigger_event: report submission or audited, whichever is greater

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the monthly reporting of financial transactions and status related to federal specific grants. Refer to Federal Assistance Manual, § 1-43. Office of General Services

retention_rules.trigger_event: report submission or audited, whichever is greater

series_metadata.series_title: Cash Position Reports - Forfeited Bond Funds
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the accounting for funds forfeited by mine operators, then deposited in a special fund for reclamation as authorized by Code of Virginia, §§ 45.1-247 and 248.
This series documents requests to the federal government for reimbursement of agency expenditures in support of federal programs. Refer to Federal Assistance Manual, § 1-43.

retention_rules.trigger_event: request submission or audited, whichever is greater

series_metadata.series_title: Shop Cost Transfer Detail Federal funds from the Federal Coal Administration are used to operate the department's garage.
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents any repair work done on vehicles used in support of either coal or non-coal related activities and documents reimbursements made to the federal government. Refer to

retention_rules.trigger_event: reimbursement or audited, whichever is greater
